description.en: To get the desired output of `"I love dogs and dogs are so much fun!"`, you will need to use the `replaceAll()` method instead of the `replace()` method. This method returns a new string for all matches to the substring.

description.en: It would be nice to see that repeated word in a sentence. Create a new variable called `newSentence` and assign it the result of concatenating the word `"I "` with the `repeatedLove` variable followed by concatenating the string `" learning."`. Then log the `newSentence` variable to the console. You can choose to use either the `+` operator or template literals for the string concatenation.
